defaultComboState.description: If Chain Strike chains to 3+ targets total, gain Chain Surge (3s): next single-target skill also chains to 1 additional enemy.

mechanics: Chain Escalation (T1a — each chain jump increases damage on next target)
Lightning Reflexes (T2 notable — chain crits trigger burst state with chain count bonus)
Chain Annihilation (T6 notable — kill via chain triggers free chain to new targets)

comboModifications.description: Chain Surge also grants +15% crit chance for the chained skill.

nodes.name: Escalating Chains
nodes.description: Each chain jump deals +12% more damage than the previous target. (Primary: base, Chain 1: +12%, Chain 2: +24%).
nodes.rank2: +18% per jump. Chain targets also have +5% crit chance.
nodes.designNotes: CHAIN_RAMP template. Unique to chain skills — damage escalates per jump. Later targets take MORE damage, not less. Opposite of typical AoE falloff.

nodes.name: Chain Precision
nodes.description: Each chain hit that crits increases the next chain's crit chance by +8%.
nodes.rank2: +12% crit cascade. If ALL chain hits crit, gain +10% crit chance for 3s.
nodes.designNotes: Crit cascade ACROSS chains. Different from Blade Dance's per-unique-target crit (target diversity) — this is per-CHAIN-JUMP crit snowball.

nodes.name: Chain Lightning
nodes.description: When Chain Strike chains to 3+ targets AND at least 2 chains crit: enter Chain Lightning state (4s). +25% crit mult and +1 chain count on all skills. +5% crit chance.
nodes.designNotes: Escalating proc gated on chain count + crit count. Different from FoK's Knife Storm (target count only) and Blade Dance's Slaughter (kill count). CS requires both REACH and PRECISION.

nodes.name: Arcing Strikes
nodes.description: Chain Strike's primary target hit gains +10% damage for each chain that fires after it.
nodes.rank2: +15% per chain. Primary target also gains +5% crit chance per chain.
nodes.designNotes: Retroactive primary-target bonus from chains. Unique — damage to the FIRST target scales with how far the chain REACHES. More chains = primary hit was 'stronger.'

nodes.name: Precision Chains
nodes.description: +8% crit multiplier per chain target hit (max +24% at 3 chains).
nodes.rank2: +12% per chain (max +36%). +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Crit mult scales with chain count. Simple conditional.

nodes.name: Chain Momentum
nodes.description: When Chain Strike hits 3+ targets: next skill in rotation gains +15% damage.
nodes.rank2: +22% damage. Also +0.5s cooldown reduction on next skill.
nodes.designNotes: Chain count → next-skill empowerment. Different from Blade Dance's Sweeping Momentum (per targets hit → next skill damage) because this gates on CHAIN COUNT specifically and adds CD reduction at rank 2.

nodes.name: Relentless Chains
nodes.description: Chain Strike kills reduce its cooldown by 0.5s per kill (kills from any chain target count).
nodes.rank2: 0.8s per kill. Max 2s reduction per cast.
nodes.designNotes: Kill-based CD reduction. Different from Stab's Kill Momentum (flat reduction, single target) because CS can kill MULTIPLE chain targets per cast.

nodes.name: Surge Mastery
nodes.description: When Chain Strike chains to 3+ targets: Chain Surge also grants +15% crit chance for the chained skill. Crits on chained targets apply Exposed (2s). +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Combo enhancement + mass Exposed. Different from FoK's Storm of Steel (multi-crit → mass Exposed) because CS does it through CHAINS, not simultaneous AoE.

nodes.name: Chain Lightning Extension
nodes.description: While Chain Lightning is active: +10% damage with all skills.
nodes.rank2: +15% damage. Each chain kill extends Chain Lightning by 0.5s (max +2s).
nodes.designNotes: Support for T2 Chain Lightning state.

nodes.name: Perfect Arc
nodes.description: Chain Strike gains +1 permanent chain (3 base → 4). Each chain hit gains +5% crit chance (cumulative: 4th target = +20%). +8% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Consistent choice. More chains = more targets = more crits = more damage. Always-on improvement.

nodes.name: Chain Explosion
nodes.description: If Chain Strike's final chain target dies: the chain CONTINUES to a new target at +50% damage. Can chain indefinitely as long as each final target dies. If chain ends without a kill: +1.5s CD penalty.
nodes.designNotes: Risky infinite chain. In a pack of weak mobs, CS could hit 5-6+ targets. Against tanky mobs, chain ends fast and you're punished.

nodes.name: Chain Annihilation
nodes.description: When Chain Strike kills 2+ targets across its chains: trigger a free Chain Strike at 100% damage with +2 bonus chains. 10s ICD. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Multi-kill → free echo with extra range. Different from FoK's Annihilation (3+ kills → free AoE) because CS's echo is another CHAIN, not AoE. The echo can chain to NEW targets the original didn't reach.

nodes.name: CHAIN MASTER
nodes.description: Chain Strike gains +2 permanent chains (4 base with T5A, or 4 base without). Each chain jump deals +20% more damage than the last (stacks with T1a). Chain Annihilation (T6) triggers on 1+ kills instead of 2+. CS cooldown increased by 2s (6s total). -15% damage with non-chain skills.
nodes.tensionDescription: T6 needs 2+ chain kills. T7 lowers to 1+ kill but adds 2s CD and nerfs non-chain skills. You're all-in on chaining — every CS fires a long chain that escalates damage per jump, and any kill triggers a free echo.

mechanics: Contagion Chains (T1a — each chain jump carries ailments from previous target to next)
Plague Chain (T2 notable — targets hit by chain that already have ailments amplify the chain's ailment)
Pandemic Chain (T6 notable — chain kill spreads ALL ailments from killed target along remaining chain)
nonTracked: +X% ailment potency per chain — T3 conditional

comboModifications.description: Chain Surge replaced with Contagion Surge: next skill's ailment applies to 2 adjacent enemies at 40% potency.

nodes.name: Contagion Chains
nodes.description: Each chain jump CARRIES the previous target's ailments to the next target at 30% potency. Ailments accumulate as the chain progresses.
nodes.rank2: 40% potency carry. Carried ailments also gain +0.5s duration.
nodes.designNotes: Ailment PROPAGATION via chains. Completely unique mechanic — ailments travel along the chain, accumulating. Target 3 in the chain has ailments from targets 1 and 2. Different from Blade Dance's Plague Link (links targets, shares damage) and FoK's mass application (hits everything at once). CS CARRIES ailments sequentially.

nodes.name: Chain Infection
nodes.description: CS ailments applied via chain carry gain +10% potency for each chain jump completed before reaching the target.
nodes.rank2: +15% per jump. Ailments from the 3rd+ chain target last 1s longer.
nodes.designNotes: Chain-carried ailments get STRONGER the further they travel. Later targets in the chain get progressively more potent ailments. Unique to chain — rewards long chains with better DoTs on distant targets.

nodes.name: Plague Chain
nodes.description: When CS chains through a target that already has 3+ ailment stacks: the chain gains +20% ailment potency for ALL subsequent targets. Stacks per ailmented target in the chain (max +60% at 3 ailmented targets). +8% ailment duration.
nodes.designNotes: Chain through pre-ailmented targets → stronger ailments later in chain. Rewards setting up ailments BEFORE chaining. Different from VS's Venom Crit (crit → enhanced reapplication) because this enhances the CHAIN itself, not individual hits.

nodes.name: Viral Path
nodes.description: Ailments carried by chains last 25% longer than directly applied ailments.
nodes.rank2: 40% longer. Chain-carried ailments also deal +10% more tick damage.
nodes.designNotes: Chain-carried ailment enhancement. Different from VS's Deep Toxin (age-based bonus) and FoK's Lingering Barrage (mass duration). CS's bonus is specifically for CHAIN-CARRIED ailments.

nodes.name: Spreading Toxin
nodes.description: +10% ailment potency per chain target hit by the most recent CS (max +30% at 3 chains).
nodes.rank2: +15% per chain (max +45%). +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Per-chain ailment potency. Simple conditional.

nodes.name: Contagion Surge
nodes.description: Chain Surge replaced with Contagion Surge (3s): next skill's ailment also applies to 2 adjacent enemies at 40% potency.
nodes.rank2: 3 adjacent at 50% potency.
nodes.designNotes: COMBO MODIFICATION. Instead of chaining damage, the next skill's AILMENTS splash. Different from Blade Dance's Plague Spread (1-2 adjacent at 50-60%) because this is triggered by CHAIN COUNT, not target hits.

nodes.name: Chain Persistence
nodes.description: Ailments applied by CS (directly or via chain carry) refresh ALL existing ailments on the target by 1s.
nodes.rank2: 1.5s refresh. +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Chain hits refresh existing ailments. Different from VS's Venomous Persistence (any skill hit refreshes VS ailments) because this refreshes ALL ailments from CS hits specifically, including chain-carried ones.

nodes.name: Plague Highway
nodes.description: When CS carries ailments to 3+ targets via chain: enter Plague Highway (4s). During this state: ALL skills' ailments are carried to 1 adjacent target at 25% potency on application. 12s ICD. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: State-shift that makes ALL skills carry ailments. Different from FoK's Toxic Storm (splash to +1 target) because this CARRIES (potency accumulates) rather than splashes. REQUIRES ENGINE 10.6 adaptation (carry, not just splash).

nodes.name: Highway Extension
nodes.description: While Plague Highway is active: +10% ailment duration for all skills.
nodes.rank2: +15% duration. Each ailment carried extends Plague Highway by 0.3s (max +2s).
nodes.designNotes: Support for Plague Highway. Per-carry extension.

nodes.name: Infinite Chain
nodes.description: Chain-carried ailments retain 50% potency instead of 30-40%. Carried ailments can themselves be carried on the next CS cast (multi-generation carry). +8% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Consistent chain ailment scaling. Ailments accumulate across multiple CS casts — each cast carries previous carried ailments further. Slow but inevitable pack-wide infection.

nodes.name: Detonation Chain
nodes.description: When CS chains through a target with 5+ ailment stacks: detonate 40% of that target's ailments as burst. Each target can detonate independently. Detonated targets lose 3 ailment stacks.
nodes.designNotes: Risky per-target detonation along chain path. Different from VS's Detonation Strike (crit-gated, single target) because CS detonates MULTIPLE targets as the chain passes through them.

nodes.name: Pandemic Chain
nodes.description: When a chain target dies during CS: ALL of that target's ailments are carried to the next chain target at 100% potency (instead of the normal 30-40% carry rate). 10s ICD. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Kill during chain → full-potency ailment carry. Different from Stab/FoK/BD kill-spreads because this carries along the CHAIN PATH, not to random nearby enemies. Targeted, sequential spreading. REQUIRES ENGINE 10.1 (kill attribution for chain kills).

nodes.name: PLAGUE CONDUIT
nodes.description: CS carries ALL ailments (from any source, not just CS ailments) between chain targets at 60% potency. Pandemic Chain (T6) triggers on ANY chain target death (no ICD). CS direct damage reduced by -30%. Non-chain skills' ailment potency reduced by -15%.
nodes.tensionDescription: T6 carries ailments at 100% on kill with ICD. T7 carries ALL ailments always at 60% but no ICD and with damage/potency penalties. CS becomes a pure ailment TRANSPORT system — low damage, but every chain spreads everyone's ailments across the pack.

mechanics: Evasive Chains (T1a — each chain target hit grants dodge chance, chain reach = defense)
Chain Counter (T2 notable — dodge triggers a free chain that prioritizes enemies attacking you)
Phantom Chain (T6 notable — dodge triggers CS-scaled chain counter to all nearby attackers)

comboModifications.description: Chain Surge replaced with Evasion Surge: +12% dodge chance for 3s.

nodes.name: Evasive Chains
nodes.description: Each chain target hit by CS grants +3% dodge chance for 3s (3 chains = +9%).
nodes.rank2: +4% per chain (+12% at 3). Duration 4s.
nodes.designNotes: Dodge from chain reach. NOTE: Pattern 'per-target-grants-dodge' is at 1 in Ghost (Stab's Evasive Rhythm uses per-HIT, not per-chain-target). This is per CHAIN TARGET which is mechanically distinct — chains hit different enemies, not the same one repeatedly. Justified.

nodes.name: Chain Recovery
nodes.description: Heal for 1% max HP per chain target hit (3 chains = 3% HP).
nodes.rank2: 1.5% per chain. At 3+ chains, also gain +1 Fortify stack.
nodes.designNotes: Per-chain healing. Different from Blade Dance's Dancing Recovery (per unique target) because CS chains are SEQUENTIAL, not targeted. Also different from VS's ailment-tick healing (passive) — this is per-CAST healing.

nodes.name: Chain Counter
nodes.description: When you dodge within 3s of casting CS: trigger a free chain counter starting from the dodged attacker, chaining to 2 nearby enemies at 70% of CS's fully-scaled damage. +1 Fortify per chain. +5 all resist.
nodes.designNotes: Dodge after CS → counter CHAIN from the attacker outward. Different from Stab's Shadow Guard (single counter) and Blade Dance's Defensive Scatter (counter each target). CS's counter IS a chain — it reaches enemies the original CS might not have hit.

nodes.name: Reactive Chains
nodes.description: After dodging: next CS cast within 3s gains +1 chain and +10% damage.
nodes.rank2: +2 chains and +15% damage. CS cooldown reduced by 1s on dodge.
nodes.designNotes: Dodge → empowered CS. Different from Stab's Reactive Footwork (dodge → damage on Stab) because this adds CHAIN COUNT — more reach from dodge event.

nodes.name: Defensive Reach
nodes.description: +4% damage reduction for 3s per chain target hit (max +12% at 3 chains).
nodes.rank2: +5% per chain (max +15%). +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: DR from chain reach. Similar pattern to Blade Dance's Scattered Defense (per target) and FoK's Crowd Control (per target) — BUT this scales with CHAIN count, which requires enemies to be alive AND in range. Different context.

nodes.name: Evasion Surge
nodes.description: Chain Surge replaced with Evasion Surge (3s): +12% dodge chance.
nodes.rank2: +16% dodge. Duration 4s.
nodes.designNotes: COMBO MODIFICATION. Defensive combo state instead of offensive chain splash.

nodes.name: Chain Resilience
nodes.description: While Chain Lightning state (T2 Predator) or Evasion Surge is active: +8% damage with CS.
nodes.rank2: +12% damage. Also +5% life leech during these states.
nodes.designNotes: State-conditional damage. Rewards having any CS buff active.

nodes.name: Flash Step
nodes.description: When you dodge 2 attacks within 4s of casting CS: enter Flash Step (3s). During Flash Step: CS chains grant +5% dodge each AND apply Weakened (1s) to all chain targets. 10s ICD. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: State-shift from dodge-after-CS. Different from Stab's Shadow Form (2 dodges → DR) and Blade Dance's Evasive Dance Form (dodge → CD reduction). CS's version creates a defensive CHAIN — dodge → chain → dodge per chain target → more dodge. Self-reinforcing through chain reach.

nodes.name: Flash Persistence
nodes.description: While Flash Step is active: +10% dodge chance.
nodes.rank2: +15% dodge. Each CS chain during Flash Step extends it by 0.5s (max +1.5s).
nodes.designNotes: Support for Flash Step. Chain-based extension.

nodes.name: Evasive Arc
nodes.description: Each CS cast grants +1 Fortify (3% DR, 6s). CS chains also grant +2% dodge per target (permanent while in combat, max +10%). +8% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Consistent sustain from chains. Fortify per cast + permanent dodge buildup from chains.

nodes.name: Thunder Counter
nodes.description: Chain Counter (T2) chains to 4 targets instead of 2 at 100% damage (instead of 70%). Counter chain crits deal +30% more. You take +10% increased damage.
nodes.designNotes: Risky counter amplification. Counter chains become primary damage source. Longer reach, full damage, crit bonus — but more fragile.

nodes.name: Phantom Chain
nodes.description: When you dodge: 18% chance to trigger Phantom Chain — a free CS counter that chains from the dodged attacker to 3 nearby enemies at 90% of CS's fully-scaled damage. 8s ICD. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Dodge → free chain counter. Different from other T6 dodge counters because this is a CHAIN that reaches multiple enemies from the attacker. The counter STARTS from the enemy and spreads outward.

nodes.name: CHAIN PHANTOM
nodes.description: Phantom Chain (T6) triggers on EVERY dodge (no chance, no ICD) at 50% damage. Each trigger also grants +1 Fortify stack. CS cooldown increased by 2s (6s total). CS direct casts deal -15% damage.
nodes.tensionDescription: T6 is rare 18% dodge counter chain. T7 fires on EVERY dodge — constant chains spreading from every dodged attack. Weaker per-hit but with Fortify per trigger. Regular CS casts nerfed. You become a reactive chain machine.
